filediff.patch:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-19T22-15-13-025Z/openrtk-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-19T22-15-13-025Z/openrtk-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-19T22-15-13-025Z/openrtk-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }

part.text: The `add` function is buggy - it returns `a - b` but should return `a + b`. The tests are correct (they expect addition, but get subtraction).
